step_rationale: P2Y1 is a core platelet activation receptor mediating ADP-triggered adhesion and aggregation.
mechanism: P2Y1 receptor mediates ADP-dependent platelet activation and thrombus formation at the site of plaque rupture.

references.title: Abacavir causes leukocyte/platelet crosstalk by activating neutrophil P2X7 receptors thus releasing soluble lectin-like oxidized low-density lipoprotein receptor-1.
